approvedBy: Steve explicit bounded Foundation queue approval plus Codex Foundation builder session
approvalSource: Steve approved the bounded Foundation queue and identified FOUNDATION-KNOWLEDGE-BASE-COMPILER-DESIGN-001 as design/proof only unless an existing card explicitly approves implementation.
notes: Approved only for Foundation-owned knowledge compiler design/proof: source contracts, ingestion permission, compiler rules, compiled wiki contract, query contract, feedback loop, quality-gate dependency, focused proof, verifier coverage, closeout, and ship gates. Not approved: live extraction, transcript fetch, screenshot capture, crawl, summarization, model call, paid/auth extraction, OAuth, connector auth, Harlan, Fal, voice, Canva, OpenHuman, broad UI redesign, Drive permission mutation, Agent Feedback auto-send, atom creation, Research Inbox write, or backlog mutation from extracted content.
